display_text: Windranger Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Windrun to reduce physical damage by 45% and grant invisibility that is not broken by attacking or casting spells. This upgrade provides strong anti-physical damage protection and evasion, allowing Windranger to sustain in fights and reposition safely.
search_text: Windranger Aghanim Scepter anti-physical-damage invisibility evasion sustain reposition

display_text: Windranger Aghanim's Shard: Summons Gale Force to push enemies in a target direction. This upgrade adds a powerful AoE control mechanic, enabling Windranger to disrupt enemy positioning and create opportunities for team fights or disengagements.
search_text: Windranger Aghanim Shard AoE-control positioning-push team-fight disengage
